gist.headline: Watering the App Garden
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds in the greenhouse, updating the latest health metrics and stats for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest usage and health data for the community.
gist.visual_concept: The automated bot is represented by the recurring Monitor Robot, doing its daily 'chore' of watering the apps (represented as code-plants in a greenhouse). Polly the bee is assisting by checking off items on a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden of code-plants inside a glowing greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
